title: ‘The Listeners’: Rebecca Hall and Janicza Bravo Break Down Show’s Ending and Why That Finale Death Was So ‘Heartbreaking’
summary: The limited series' director and star go deep with IndieWire about their creative love affair, the characters who needed matching haircuts, and what to make of a wrenching finale to this on-screen adaptation of Jordan Tannahill's novel.
imageAlt: ‘The Listeners’: Rebecca Hall and Janicza Bravo Break Down Show’s Ending and Why That Finale Death Was So ‘Heartbreaking’

[Editor’s note: The following interview contains spoilers for the finale of “The Listeners.”]

Ever get that annoying buzzing sound in your ear that only you can hear? Imagine if that sound never went away. That’s the premise of “The Listeners,” the recent Starz limited series starring Rebecca Hall and Ollie West.

While “The Listeners” may have been a slow horror tour for its main character, Claire (Rebecca Hall), and for the audience who watched her suffer in silence, behind the scenes, the show was a love story f...
